title: schomburgkia anceps
intro: Schomburgkia anceps, also known as the split-petaled Schomburgkia, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which are believed to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schomburgkia anceps are thought to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as anti-inflammatory effects that may help to soothe skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Schomburgkia anceps can be made by infusing the plant's flowers and leaves in water, or by using the roots and stems to create a tincture.
